# Frontmatter-tagged note

Tasks in this file inherit tags from the YAML frontmatter (if the indexer honors that). Compare query results that filter on `#frontmatter-tag` to confirm.

- [ ] Frontmatter-only tagged task #task #edge
- [ ] Frontmatter tag plus inline tag #task #edge #inline-tag
